free_text: For the nuclides of interest high-purity compounds
Cadmium ratio measurements (wall thickness of Cd-
The resonance integral (RI) was determined from the
cross section,Cr = cadmium ratio and R the ratio
of the thermal to epithermal neutron flux.
The R were determined with gold monitor.
The thermal cross section were taken from the Chart
of Nuclides except of Ti-50 and In-113 (to In-114m)
The second part of the compilation is published in
In addition to the resonance integral are given the
half life of the produced isotope,the main gamma-line,
the thermal cross section, the ratio of res. integral
to thermal cross section,some literature values for
resonance integral and the main resonance energies.
As RI is derived from the thermal cross-section, the
ratio of RI/CSth is also given (see second REACTION
code in Subents). CSth - thermal cross section.
For thermal and epithermal self-shielding for the
Standard deviation on cadmium and flux
ratios. No contribution is included for uncertainty
in the assumed value for the thermal cross sections.
MONITOR changed and REACTION codes revised.
SD:Updated to new date formats,lower case.
corrected according to last EXFOR rules and Dict.
HISTORY and STATUS keywords deleted from Subents
002-061 = identical to HISTORY keyword in Subent 001.
Code SUM deleted from REACTION (Subents 007,010, etc.)
and MONITOR (or ASSUMED in all Subents)
Reactions in ASSUMED and MONITOR were swapped in
Subents 004-012. Pointers added in if it was needed.
